seo.title: Technical SEO for Web Apps tools directory
seo.description: A developer-first directory of Technical SEO for Web Apps tools and references.

content.intro: A curated directory of technical SEO tools, libraries, and documentation specifically selected for developers building and maintaining high-performance web applications. Focuses on crawlability, structured data, and Core Web Vitals.

entries.name: Screaming Frog SEO Spider
entries.description: Desktop-based crawler for auditing large-scale web applications for broken links, redirect chains, and missing metadata.
pros: Local execution allows for high-speed crawling without server-side rate limiting
JavaScript rendering mode supports SPAs built with React or Vue
Deep integration with Google Search Console and PageSpeed Insights APIs
cons: Memory intensive for sites exceeding 500k URLs

entries.name: Google Search Console
entries.description: Primary communication channel from Google regarding site indexing, crawl errors, and Core Web Vitals performance.
pros: Direct data from Google on how they view and index your pages
Real-time alerts for security issues and manual actions
Accurate URL inspection tool to debug rendering issues
cons: Data is often delayed by 48-72 hours
Limited historical data retention in the UI

entries.name: Schema Markup Validator
entries.description: Official tool for testing JSON-LD, Microdata, and RDFa structured data against Schema.org standards.
pros: Supports the latest Schema.org vocabulary updates
Validates syntax and required properties for specific entity types
Accepts raw code snippets or live URLs
cons: Does not confirm eligibility for Google Rich Results specifically

entries.name: Next-SEO
entries.description: A plugin that makes managing SEO in Next.js projects easier by handling meta tags, JSON-LD, and Open Graph.
pros: Declarative configuration for global and per-page SEO
Built-in support for multiple JSON-LD types (Article, Product, FAQ)
Reduces boilerplate in Next.js _app.js and page files
cons: Requires manual updates to stay in sync with latest Schema specs

entries.name: DebugBear
entries.description: Monitoring tool focused on Core Web Vitals and site speed, providing actionable CI/CD integration.
pros: Detailed Lighthouse reports with historical trend tracking
Competitor benchmarking and side-by-side comparisons
CI/CD integration to prevent performance regressions
cons: Higher cost entry point for small teams
Can be overwhelming with the volume of data provided

entries.name: Merkle Schema Generator
entries.description: Technical SEO tool for generating valid JSON-LD code for various Schema.org types via a GUI.
pros: User-friendly interface for complex nested objects
Instant validation against Google's Rich Results requirements
One-click copy to clipboard functionality
cons: Manual process not suitable for programmatic generation

entries.name: Web Vitals Library
entries.description: A tiny, modular library for measuring all the Web Vitals metrics on real users, in a way that accurately matches how they are measured by Chrome.
pros: Official library maintained by the Google Chrome team
Accurate Real User Monitoring (RUM) data capture
Extremely small bundle size footprint
cons: Requires custom backend or third-party ingestion to store data
Purely a data collection tool, no visualization included

entries.name: Cloudflare SEO Workers
entries.description: Use Cloudflare Workers to modify HTML on the edge to optimize SEO without changing origin code.
pros: Bypass legacy CMS limitations to inject meta tags or redirects
Zero latency impact for users due to edge execution
Ideal for A/B testing SEO changes without backend deployments
cons: Requires knowledge of JavaScript and the Workers platform
Can lead to logic fragmentation if overused

entries.name: Ahrefs Site Audit
entries.description: Cloud-based crawler that provides a comprehensive health score and identifies technical SEO issues automatically.
pros: No local hardware resources required for large crawls
Visualizes internal linking structure and click depth
Provides clear prioritization of issues based on impact
cons: Free tier is restricted to verified sites only

entries.name: Sitebulb
entries.description: A website auditing tool that provides prioritized recommendations and high-level data visualization.
pros: Exceptional report generation for stakeholders
Detailed hints that explain why an issue matters
Strong focus on accessibility and security alongside SEO
